message:
docs(readme): add Homebrew and Scoop package manager installation options

Add alternative installation methods via Homebrew (macOS/Linux) and
Scoop (Windows) package managers for users who prefer managed installs.
Updated platform note to include Windows.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -20,7 +20,18 @@ Ultra-fast CLI for searching and querying your X data archive with sub-milliseco curl -fsSL https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Dicklesworthstone/xf/main/install.sh | bash ``` -

Works on Linux and macOS. Auto-detects your platform and downloads the right binary.

+**Or via package managers:** + +```bash +# macOS/Linux (Homebrew) +brew install dicklesworthstone/tap/xf + +# Windows (Scoop) +scoop bucket add dicklesworthstone https://github.com/Dicklesworthstone/scoop-bucket +scoop install dicklesworthstone/xf +``` + +

Works on Linux, macOS, and Windows. Auto-detects your platform and downloads the right binary.

---
